entity.summary: Non-custodial decentralized exchange using an off-chain order book with on-chain settlement. Bitcratic supports Ethereum and BNB Smart Chain token markets without account registration and currently exposes public order books, trading interfaces, API documentation, deposit and withdrawal functions, and system-status pages.
entity.notes: Launch date follows a contemporary community description of the exchange's November 26, 2018 launch and is retained at medium confidence because a first-party launch announcement was not recovered. The official site and guides confirm the current Ethereum and BNB Smart Chain DEX identity.

events.title: Bitcratic decentralized exchange launched
events.description: Bitcratic launched as an Ethereum-based decentralized exchange using an off-chain order book and on-chain settlement.
events.notes: The exact date comes from a contemporary community account and should be upgraded if a first-party launch archive is recovered.

evidence.title: Bitcratic decentralized exchange launch account
evidence.notes: Contemporary community description states that Bitcratic launched on November 26, 2018 and explains its Ethereum order-book model.

evidence.title: Bitcratic user guide
evidence.notes: Official guide identifies Bitcratic as an Ethereum and BNB Smart Chain decentralized exchange that does not require registration or login.

evidence.title: Bitcratic official DEX interface
evidence.notes: Current official interface exposes order books, trades, balances, orders, and transaction functions.

evidence.title: Bitcratic API documentation
evidence.notes: Official API documentation covers tickers, orders, trades, deposits, withdrawals, and the exchange backend.

evidence.title: Bitcratic system status
evidence.notes: Current official status page lists active deposit, withdrawal, and trading states for supported assets.
